title: Crisp Ethiopian Yellow Split Peas Stir-fry
description: This light and earthy dish features roasted yellow split peas in a crispy texture, perfect for a Paleo-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp olive oil or coconut oil

instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add onions and garlic to the hot pan and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the split peas and continue cooking for another 10-15 minutes or until they start to become crisp.
Add bell peppers and water/vegetable broth, bring to a boil then reduce heat to low.
Let simmer for about 20 minutes to allow flavors to meld together and the vegetables to soften slightly.
Serve hot as a side dish with grilled meats or fish.
